responsible.title: 1. Data Controller
responsible.description: Zonaraíz is responsible for processing personal data in accordance with Colombian legislation on personal data protection.

data.title: 2. Data Collected
data.description: We may collect identification data, contact information, commercial information, and browsing and usage data from the platform.

purposes.title: 3. Purposes
purposes.description: The data will be used to operate the platform, facilitate contact between users, personalize content, send communications related to the service, and for statistical analysis and system improvement.

base.title: 4. Legal Basis for Processing
base.description: Processing is carried out based on the data subject's authorization, the use of publicly available information, and the legitimate interest in operating the platform.

sources.title: 5. Data from Public Sources
sources.description: Zonaraíz may process data obtained from public or open sources, including commercial and contact information. In these cases, data subjects' rights will be respected and requests for modification or deletion will be allowed.

sharing.title: 6. Data Sharing
sharing.description: Data may be shared with other interested users, technology providers, and analysis tools.

security.title: 7. Security
security.description: Zonaraíz implements reasonable security measures to protect personal data, but cannot guarantee absolute invulnerability against potential threats.

rights.title: 8. Data Subject Rights
rights.description: Data subjects may access their data, request correction, request deletion, and revoke the authorization granted for processing.

procedure.title: 9. Queries and Complaints Procedure
procedure.description: Requests can be made through the official channels defined by Zonaraíz. Responses will be provided within a reasonable time.

conservation.title: 10. Data Retention
conservation.description: Data will be retained as long as necessary for the purposes of the service.

changes.title: 11. Modifications
changes.description: Zonaraíz may modify this policy at any time. Continued use of the platform implies acceptance of the changes.

applicable.title: 12. Applicable Legislation
applicable.description: This policy is governed by Colombian legislation, particularly Law 1581 of 2012 and its regulatory decrees.
